pages.purpose: Default landing page for Web platform. Provides management with a bird's-eye view of all experiments — status, progress, anomalies, and data completeness — at a single glance. Serves as the entry point for drill-down into individual experiments.
pages.purposeZh: Web 端默认首页。为管理层提供所有实验的一览视图——状态、进度、异常和数据完整度——一目了然。作为下钻至单个实验的入口。
pages.businessValue: Implements Decision-001: overview-first navigation. Eliminates the need to check experiments one by one via phone or Excel. Management sees total experiment asset status on login.
pages.businessValueZh: 实现 Decision-001：概览优先导航。消除逐个实验电话或 Excel 查询的需要。管理层登录即见实验资产全局状态。
keyFeatures: 4 stat cards: total experiments, avg record completeness (%), anomaly data records, today's new records — each with trend indicator
Experiment list table with columns: code, building/unit, growth stage, location, phases, current progress, status, anomaly level, completeness (progress bar), report access dropdown (8 report types)
Anomaly alert table: time, experiment, pen, anomaly type, description, drill-down action
Search/filter bar: experiment code (text), farm location (dropdown), experiment status (dropdown)
Breadcrumb navigation: 实验研发 › 猪实验数据 › 实验概览
Sidebar: 知识库, 项目管理, 实验场, 猪实验数据 (概览/报表分析), 家禽实验数据
keyFeaturesZh: 4 张统计卡片：实验总数、平均记录完整度(%)、异常数据记录、今日新增记录——各附趋势指标
实验列表表格：实验编号、栋舍-单元、生长阶段、地点、阶段、当前进度、状态、异常等级、完整度(进度条)、报表下拉菜单(8种报表)
异常预警表格：预警时间、实验编号、栏位、异常类型、异常描述、下钻操作
搜索筛选栏：实验编号(文本)、实验场(下拉)、实验状态(下拉)
面包屑导航：实验研发 › 猪实验数据 › 实验概览
侧边栏：知识库、项目管理、实验场、猪实验数据(概览/报表分析)、家禽实验数据
dataSources: Experiment metadata table (code, location, stage, phases, groups)
Data completeness scoring engine (记录完整度 %)
Anomaly detection engine (alert type, severity, description)
Daily record aggregation (today's new records count)
dataSourcesZh: 实验元数据表（编号、地点、阶段、分组）
数据完整度评分引擎（记录完整度 %）
异常检测引擎（预警类型、严重程度、描述）
日常记录汇总（今日新增记录数）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Add role-based dashboard views (CEO sees all farms aggregated, farm manager sees only assigned farm). Phase 3: Add cross-experiment comparison quick-access from overview.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：增加基于角色的仪表盘视图（CEO 看全部场区汇总，场长只看所管场区）。Phase 3：增加从概览页快速进入跨实验对比的入口。

pages.purpose: Comprehensive report hub for PhD researchers. Displays summary stat cards, interactive charts, and 8 pre-built report types auto-populated from raw experiment data. Eliminates manual Excel aggregation.
pages.purposeZh: 面向博士研究人员的综合报表中心。展示汇总统计卡片、交互式图表和 8 种从原始实验数据自动生成的预置报表。消除手工 Excel 汇总。
pages.businessValue: Reduces report generation time from hours (manual Excel) to minutes (auto-generated). Enables stage comparison, cross-stage merge analysis, and data export for external statistical tools.
pages.businessValueZh: 将报表生成时间从小时级（手工 Excel）降至分钟级（自动生成）。支持阶段对比、跨阶段合并分析和数据导出供外部统计工具使用。
keyFeatures: Summary stat cards: daily death/cull count, current stock count, daily feed amount (kg), average temperature (°C), diarrhea head count
Interactive charts: line charts for date-based trends (日龄 vs 头数, 日龄 vs 死淘率), bar charts for group comparisons
8 pre-built report types: daily, stage, experiment summary, death/cull detail, diarrhea detail, medicine/vaccine detail, environment detail, weight detail
Stage comparison: compare treatment groups within the same stage
Stage merge: aggregate data across completed stages
Cross-experiment comparison: compare results across different experiments
Export: Excel (further analysis), PDF (sharing/archival)
keyFeaturesZh: 汇总统计卡片：当日死淘数、当日存栏数、日下料量(kg)、平均温度(℃)、腹泻头数
交互式图表：日期趋势折线图（日龄 vs 头数、日龄 vs 死淘率）、分组对比柱状图
8 种预置报表：日报表、阶段报表、实验总结表、死淘明细表、腹泻明细表、药品疫苗明细表、环控明细表、称重明细表
阶段对比：对比同一阶段内不同处理组
阶段合并：汇总已完成阶段的数据
跨实验对比：对比不同实验的结果
导出：Excel（进一步分析）、PDF（分享/存档）
dataSources: Daily death/cull records (per pen, with reason/gender/weight)
Daily feed intake records (per pen, kg)
Daily environmental control records (temperature, humidity, ventilation)
dataSourcesZh: 每日死淘记录（按栏位，含原因/性别/重量）
每日环控记录（温度、湿度、通风）
实验元数据（编号、分组、阶段、地点）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Add custom report builder (user-defined filters and columns). Phase 4: AI-generated experiment summaries and natural-language query for report generation.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：增加自定义报表构建器（用户自定义筛选和列）。Phase 4：AI 生成实验总结和自然语言查询生成报表。

pages.purpose: Experiment creation interface for PhD researchers. Configure experiment metadata: unique experiment code, growth stage selection, farm location assignment, and phase/stage configuration.
pages.purposeZh: 博士创建实验的界面。配置实验元数据：唯一实验编号、生长阶段选择、实验场分配、阶段配置。
pages.businessValue: Standardizes experiment setup with mandatory fields and unique code validation. Eliminates ad-hoc experiment definitions that make cross-experiment comparison impossible.
pages.businessValueZh: 通过必填字段和唯一编号校验标准化实验创建。消除临时性实验定义导致跨实验对比不可行的问题。
keyFeatures: Experiment code generation (unique ID, e.g., SWINE-NUR-XY-001-2026)
Growth stage selection: 保育 (nursery), 育肥 (fattening), 保育到育肥 (nursery to fattening)
Farm location dropdown (襄阳, 内蒙古, 东营, 成都)
Phase/stage configuration (number of stages, stage names, stage sequence)
Code uniqueness validation
Mandatory field completeness check
keyFeaturesZh: 实验编号生成（唯一标识，如 SWINE-NUR-XY-001-2026）
生长阶段选择：保育、育肥、保育到育肥
实验场下拉选择（襄阳、内蒙古、东营、成都）
阶段配置（阶段数量、阶段名称、阶段顺序）
编号唯一性校验
必填字段完整性检查
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Add experiment template library (pre-configured stage templates for common experiment types). Phase 3: Clone/copy existing experiment configuration.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：增加实验模板库（常用实验类型的预配置阶段模板）。Phase 3：克隆/复制已有实验配置。

pages.purpose: Treatment group assignment interface. PhD configures treatment/control groups; farm manager uploads and confirms pen assignments. Links treatment groups to physical building/unit/pens and sets initial pig counts.
pages.purposeZh: 处理组分配界面。博士配置处理/对照组；场长上传并确认栏位分配。将处理组关联到物理栋-单元-栏位并设定初始猪只数量。
pages.businessValue: Ensures experiment group assignments are correctly mapped to physical farm layout. Provides auditable record of group configuration for later comparison analysis.
pages.businessValueZh: 确保实验分组正确映射到物理场区布局。为后续对比分析提供可审计的分组配置记录。
keyFeatures: Treatment group creation and naming (处理组1, 处理组2, 对照组...)
Building/unit/pen assignment per group
Initial pig count per group
Group status: 已分配 (assigned), 待分配 (pending)
Farm manager upload and confirmation workflow
Pig number uniqueness validation
keyFeaturesZh: 处理组创建和命名（处理组1、处理组2、对照组...）
每组栋-单元-栏位分配
每组初始猪只数量
分组状态：已分配、待分配
场长上传和确认流程
猪只编号唯一性校验
dataSourcesZh: 场区/栋/单元/栏位主数据
实验元数据（关联实验编号）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Support randomized group assignment. Phase 3: Visual pen layout selector (drag-and-drop assignment).
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：支持随机分组分配。Phase 3：可视化栏位布局选择器（拖拽分配）。

pages.purpose: PhD reviews stage-end data submitted by farm manager. Approves the stage to mark it 已结束 (completed) or rejects it with feedback for data correction. Gate between stage execution and stage analysis.
pages.purposeZh: 博士审核场长提交的阶段结束数据。批准通过后将阶段标记为「已结束」，或驳回并附反馈意见要求数据修正。阶段执行与阶段分析之间的门控节点。
pages.businessValue: Ensures data quality before analysis. Prevents bad data from propagating into stage comparison and final merge, protecting the integrity of experiment conclusions.
pages.businessValueZh: 在分析前确保数据质量。防止错误数据进入阶段对比和最终合并，保护实验结论的完整性。
keyFeatures: Stage data completeness validation (are all pens recorded?)
Stage data summary view across all data domains
Approve button: transitions stage status 待审核 → 已结束
Reject button: transitions stage status 待审核 → 进行中, with feedback notes
Modification history view (who changed what, when)
Stage state display: 待开始 / 进行中 / 待审核 / 已结束 / 已归档
keyFeaturesZh: 阶段数据完整性校验（所有栏位是否都已记录？）
所有数据域的阶段数据汇总视图
批准按钮：阶段状态 待审核 → 已结束
驳回按钮：阶段状态 待审核 → 进行中，附反馈意见
修改历史查看（谁在何时改了什么）
阶段状态显示：待开始 / 进行中 / 待审核 / 已结束 / 已归档
dataSources: All daily records for the stage (death/cull, feed, environment, medicine, diarrhea, weight)
dataSourcesZh: 本阶段所有日常记录（死淘、采食、环控、药品、腹泻、称重）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Add side-by-side data version comparison. Phase 3: Auto-flag anomalies during review (e.g., sudden data gaps).
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：增加并列数据版本对比。Phase 3：审核时自动标记异常（如数据突然缺失）。

pages.purpose: Final confirmation that all experiment stages are complete. PhD confirms experiment end, triggers final data merge, and transitions experiment status to 已归档 (archived). Last step before final report generation.
pages.purposeZh: 确认所有实验阶段已完成的最终确认。博士确认实验结束，触发最终数据合并，将实验状态转为「已归档」。生成最终报告前的最后一步。
pages.businessValue: Formal experiment closure with auditable sign-off. Ensures no incomplete or un-reviewed data enters the final experiment archive and report.
pages.businessValueZh: 正式的实验结栏及可审计签核。确保没有不完整或未审核的数据进入最终实验归档和报告。
keyFeatures: All-stage completion check (all stages must be 已结束)
Final merge trigger: aggregates all stage data into complete experiment dataset
Experiment status transition: 已结束 → 已归档
Pre-closeout validation summary
Confirmation dialog with sign-off record
keyFeaturesZh: 全阶段完成检查（所有阶段必须为已结束）
最终合并触发：将所有阶段数据汇总为完整实验数据集
实验状态转换：已结束 → 已归档
结栏前校验摘要
带签核记录的确认对话框
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Auto-generate experiment summary report on close-out. Phase 4: AI-generated experiment conclusion draft.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：结栏时自动生成实验总结报告。Phase 4：AI 生成实验结论草稿。

pages.purpose: Mobile landing page for farm managers and technicians. Shows experiment list with search and status filtering. Provides quick access to experiment detail and daily recording.
pages.purposeZh: 场长和技术员的移动端首页。展示带搜索和状态筛选的实验列表。提供快速进入实验详情和日常记录的入口。
pages.businessValue: On-site staff can immediately find their assigned experiments and begin recording without navigating complex menus. Mobile-optimized for in-farm use.
pages.businessValueZh: 现场人员可立即找到所负责的实验并开始记录，无需在复杂菜单中导航。移动端优化，适合场内使用。
keyFeatures: Experiment list with search bar (search by experiment code)
Status cards: 进行中 (in progress), 已完成 (completed), 待开始 (pending)
Progress bar per experiment
Experiment code, location, growth stage, current progress display
Quick action: + 新建实验 (new experiment) button
Tap experiment card to navigate to experiment detail
keyFeaturesZh: 带搜索栏的实验列表（按实验编号搜索）
状态卡片：进行中、已完成、待开始
每个实验的进度条
实验编号、地点、生长阶段、当前进度展示
快捷操作：+ 新建实验按钮
点击实验卡片进入实验详情
dataSourcesZh: 数据完整度评分引擎（进度条）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Add role-filtered view (technician sees only assigned experiments). Phase 3: Offline-cached experiment list for poor connectivity farms.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：增加角色筛选视图（技术员只看分配实验）。Phase 3：弱网农场的离线缓存实验列表。

pages.purpose: Detailed view of a single experiment on mobile. Shows basic info, progress statistics, and provides the entry point to begin daily recording. Bridge between overview and data entry.
pages.purposeZh: 移动端单个实验的详细视图。展示基本信息、进度统计，并提供开始日常记录的入口。概览与数据录入之间的桥梁。
pages.businessValue: Gives on-site staff immediate context about the experiment they're working on before entering data — reducing errors from working on the wrong experiment.
pages.businessValueZh: 让现场人员在录入数据前立即了解所操作实验的背景——减少因操作错误实验而产生的错误。
keyFeatures: Basic info card: experiment code, growth stage, farm location, building/unit, current stage
Progress statistics: completion percentage (large), current stage name
Stage progress timeline
Primary CTA: 进入日常记录 (enter daily recording) button
Back navigation to experiment overview
keyFeaturesZh: 基本信息卡片：实验编号、生长阶段、实验场、栋-单元、当前阶段
进度统计：完成百分比（大字）、当前阶段名称
阶段进度时间轴
主要操作按钮：进入日常记录
返回实验概览导航
dataSources: Stage state machine (current stage, stage history)
dataSourcesZh: 阶段状态机（当前阶段、阶段历史）
数据完整度评分引擎（进度 %）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Add quick-alert indicator if experiment has active anomalies. Phase 3: Photo gallery of experiment site.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：增加活跃异常快速预警指示。Phase 3：实验现场照片库。

pages.purpose: Mobile-optimized experiment creation form. Simplified version of the Web new-experiment page, optimized for farm manager use in the field.
pages.purposeZh: 移动端优化的实验创建表单。Web 端新建实验页面的简化版，针对场长现场使用优化。
pages.businessValue: Enables experiment initiation directly from the farm without requiring a desktop. Speeds up experiment setup for urgent or ad-hoc experiments.
pages.businessValueZh: 支持直接从场区发起实验，无需桌面端。加速紧急或临时实验的创建。
keyFeatures: Experiment code (auto-generated, readonly on App)
Growth stage selector (保育/育肥/保育到育肥)
Farm location selector (襄阳/内蒙古/东营)
Basic phase configuration
Next step CTA: navigate to experiment grouping
keyFeaturesZh: 实验编号（自动生成，App 端只读）
生长阶段选择器（保育/育肥/保育到育肥）
实验场选择器（襄阳/内蒙古/东营）
基础阶段配置
下一步操作：进入实验分组
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 3: QR code scan to auto-fill farm/location from physical farm signage.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 3：扫码自动填充场区/地点（从物理场区标识牌）。

pages.purpose: Mobile interface for farm manager to upload and confirm treatment group assignments. Complementary to the Web grouping page — Web for configuration, App for on-site confirmation.
pages.purposeZh: 场长上传和确认处理组分配的移动端界面。与 Web 端分组页面互补——Web 端配置，App 端现场确认。
pages.businessValue: Farm manager can verify group-to-pen mapping while physically standing in the barn, ensuring accuracy between digital configuration and physical reality.
pages.businessValueZh: 场长可以在猪舍现场核实分组与栏位映射，确保数字配置与物理实际一致。
keyFeatures: Treatment group list with assignment status (已分配/待分配)
Building/unit/pen assignment per group
Pig count per group
Confirm grouping button (场长确认)
Upload capability for grouping data
keyFeaturesZh: 处理组列表及分配状态（已分配/待分配）
每组栋-单元-栏位分配
每组猪只数量
确认分组按钮（场长确认）
分组数据上传功能
dataSourcesZh: 场区/栋/单元/栏位主数据
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 3: Barcode/QR scan per pen to confirm assignment in real-time at the pen.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 3：每栏扫码实时确认分配。

pages.purpose: Core daily recording interface for farm managers and technicians. Central hub for all on-site data collection during routine barn patrol. Supports switching between data types (death/cull, feed, environment, medicine, diarrhea, weight) with standardized forms.
pages.purposeZh: 场长和技术员的核心日常记录界面。日常巡栏期间所有现场数据采集的中心枢纽。支持在数据类型（死淘、采食、环控、药品、腹泻、称重）之间切换并使用标准化表单。
pages.businessValue: Replaces paper notebooks and Excel with standardized, validated forms directly at the point of data generation. Reduces transcription errors and ensures field-level validation at entry.
pages.businessValueZh: 用标准化、带校验的表单取代纸质记录本和 Excel，在数据产生的现场直接录入。减少转录错误，确保录入时的字段级校验。
keyFeatures: Experiment header card: code, location, growth stage, current stage, progress
Stage progress indicator (current step title, progress bar)
Pen initial info summary (栏位初始信息)
Tab-based record type switching: 死淘, 采食, 环控, 药品疫苗, 腹泻, 称重
Standardized forms per type with field validation (type, mandatory, range, chronological)
死亡记录 form: date, pen, death count, weight, gender, reason (multi-select with 'other'), days, cumulative auto-calculation
淘汰记录 form: date, pen, cull count, weight, gender, days, cumulative auto-calculation
采食记录 form: date, pen, feed amount (kg)
环控记录 form: temperature, humidity, ventilation
药品疫苗记录 form: type, dosage, date, batch
腹泻记录 form: head count, severity, duration
称重记录 form: individual/group weight
Add/delete record rows per data type
Date display for current recording session
Edit dialog for modifying existing records
keyFeaturesZh: 实验头部卡片：编号、地点、生长阶段、当前阶段、进度
阶段进度指示器（当前步骤标题、进度条）
栏位初始信息摘要
基于 Tab 的记录类型切换：死淘、采食、环控、药品疫苗、腹泻、称重
每种类型的标准化表单及字段校验（类型、必填、范围、时间顺序）
死亡记录表单：日期、栏位、死亡数量、重量、性别、原因（多选含「其他」）、天数、自动计算累计
淘汰记录表单：日期、栏位、淘汰数量、重量、性别、天数、自动计算累计
采食记录表单：日期、栏位、饲喂量(kg)
环控记录表单：温度、湿度、通风
药品疫苗记录表单：类型、剂量、日期、批次
腹泻记录表单：头数、严重程度、持续时间
称重记录表单：个体/群体重量
每种数据类型可增加/删除记录行
当前记录会话的日期显示
修改已有记录的编辑对话框
dataSources: Daily records table per data domain (write)
Pen master data (pen list with building/unit/pen hierarchy)
Audit log (operator, timestamp, source per record)
dataSourcesZh: 每个数据域的日常记录表（写入）
栏位主数据（栋-单元-栏位层级）
实验元数据 + 阶段状态（上下文头部）
累计计算引擎（自动汇总历史记录）
审计日志（每条记录的操作人、时间戳、来源）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Voice-to-text for reason/notes fields. Phase 3: Offline recording with sync-when-online. Phase 4: AI data quality suggestions during entry (e.g., 'this weight is 30% below average for this stage — confirm?').
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：原因/备注字段语音转文字。Phase 3：离线记录+联网时同步。Phase 4：录入时 AI 数据质量建议（如「该体重低于本阶段平均值 30%——确认？」）。

pages.pageTitleZh: 日常数据 — 自动同步
pages.purpose: Review interface for data automatically ingested from external farm systems (feeders, environmental sensors, etc.). Farm manager validates synced data and corrects anomalies before committing to experiment records.
pages.purposeZh: 从外部场区系统（饲喂器、环控传感器等）自动接入数据的审核界面。场长在提交至实验记录前校验同步数据并修正异常。
pages.businessValue: Reduces manual data entry for farms with automated feeding/environmental systems. Human-in-the-loop validation ensures auto-synced data quality before it enters experiment analysis.
pages.businessValueZh: 减少配备自动化饲喂/环控系统场区的手工数据录入。人机协同校验确保自动同步数据在进入实验分析前的质量。
keyFeatures: Synced data preview grouped by data type and pen
Anomaly highlighting (values flagged by range rules)
Inline edit capability for flagged records
Batch accept/reject for synced records
Sync source and timestamp display per record
keyFeaturesZh: 按数据类型和栏位分组的同步数据预览
异常高亮（被范围规则标记的值）
被标记记录的内联编辑功能
同步记录的批量接受/拒绝
每条记录的同步来源和时间戳显示
dataSources: External farm system data feeds (feeders, environmental sensors)
dataSourcesZh: 外部场区系统数据源（饲喂器、环控传感器）
数据校验规则引擎（范围检查）
日常记录表（审核后写入）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 3: Auto-accept records within normal range (reduce review burden). Phase 4: ML-based anomaly detection replacing static threshold rules.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 3：正常范围内记录自动接受（减少审核负担）。Phase 4：基于机器学习的异常检测替代静态阈值规则。

pages.pageTitleZh: 日常数据 — 批量导入
pages.purpose: Mobile interface for batch Excel data import. Farm manager downloads experiment-specific template, fills data offline in Excel, uploads with validation. Bridges the Excel-to-platform transition for farms with existing Excel workflows.
pages.purposeZh: 批量 Excel 数据导入的移动端界面。场长下载实验专用模板，在 Excel 中离线填写数据，带校验上传。为已有 Excel 工作流的场区搭建过渡桥梁。
pages.businessValue: Provides a migration path for farms that have existing Excel data or prefer batch entry for certain data types. Reduces friction during platform adoption.
pages.businessValueZh: 为已有 Excel 数据或偏好批量录入的场区提供迁移路径。降低平台采纳过程中的阻力。
keyFeatures: Template download button (experiment-specific, pre-filled with pen list and date range)
File upload with drag-and-drop or file picker
Upload validation: field type check, range check, mandatory field check
Validation error summary with row-level error details
Import preview before commit
Import history log
keyFeaturesZh: 模板下载按钮（实验专用，预填栏位列表和日期范围）
文件上传（拖拽或文件选择器）
上传校验：字段类型检查、范围检查、必填项检查
带行级错误详情的校验错误摘要
提交前导入预览
导入历史日志
dataSourcesZh: Excel 模板生成器（实验元数据 → 模板）
日常记录表（校验后写入）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Web-based batch import with larger file support. Phase 3: Auto-detect and map column headers from legacy Excel formats.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：Web 端批量导入，支持更大文件。Phase 3：自动检测并映射历史 Excel 格式的列头。

pages.purpose: Farm manager submits a completed stage for PhD review. Triggers stage data completeness validation, packages all stage records, and transitions stage status from 进行中 to 待审核.
pages.purposeZh: 场长提交已完成阶段供博士审核。触发阶段数据完整性校验，打包所有阶段记录，将阶段状态从「进行中」转为「待审核」。
pages.businessValue: Formalizes the handoff between farm execution and PhD analysis. Ensures no stage proceeds to analysis without explicit farm manager sign-off and completeness check.
pages.businessValueZh: 正式化现场执行与博士分析之间的交接。确保没有阶段在未经场长明确签核和完整性检查的情况下进入分析。
keyFeatures: Stage data summary across all record types
Data completeness check (all pens, all days, all required fields)
Missing data warnings with specific gaps highlighted
Submit confirmation with notes field
Status transition: 进行中 → 待审核
Submission timestamp and submitter identity recorded
keyFeaturesZh: 所有记录类型的阶段数据汇总
数据完整性检查（所有栏位、所有天数、所有必填字段）
缺失数据警告，高亮具体缺口
带备注字段的提交确认
状态转换：进行中 → 待审核
提交时间戳和提交人身份记录
dataSources: All daily records for the stage (aggregated)
dataSourcesZh: 本阶段所有日常记录（汇总）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Auto-prevent submission if completeness below threshold. Phase 3: Batch stage-end submit for multiple experiments.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：完整度低于阈值时自动阻止提交。Phase 3：多个实验批量阶段结束提交。

pages.purpose: Farm manager views PhD review result for a submitted stage. If approved, the stage is confirmed as 已结束. If rejected, farmer sees rejection reason and enters data correction workflow.
pages.purposeZh: 场长查看博士对已提交阶段的审核结果。若通过，阶段确认「已结束」。若驳回，场长查看驳回原因并进入数据修正流程。
pages.businessValue: Closes the feedback loop between PhD review and farm correction. Provides clear accountability: who approved/rejected, when, and why.
pages.businessValueZh: 闭合博士审核与现场修正之间的反馈循环。提供清晰的问责：谁批准/驳回、何时、为什么。
keyFeatures: Review result display: 通过 (approved) or 驳回 (rejected)
Rejection reason and feedback notes from PhD
If approved: stage status 待审核 → 已结束, next stage initiation prompt
If rejected: direct link to data correction (navigate to daily records for the stage)
Review timestamp and reviewer identity
keyFeaturesZh: 审核结果显示：通过或驳回
博士的驳回原因和反馈备注
若通过：阶段状态 待审核 → 已结束，提示启动下一阶段
若驳回：直接链接到数据修正（导航至该阶段的日常记录）
审核时间戳和审核人身份
dataSourcesZh: 阶段审核决定（来自博士/Web端）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Push notification when PhD completes review. Phase 3: Inline data correction without leaving the confirm screen.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：博士完成审核时推送通知。Phase 3：无需离开确认界面即可内联修正数据。

pages.purpose: Farm manager views final experiment close-out status on mobile. Confirms that all stages are complete and the experiment has been archived by the PhD. Read-only summary view.
pages.purposeZh: 场长在移动端查看最终实验结栏状态。确认所有阶段已完成、实验已被博士归档。只读汇总视图。
pages.businessValue: Gives farm manager visibility into experiment completion status. Marks the formal end of on-site responsibilities for the experiment.
pages.businessValueZh: 让场长了解实验完成状态。标志着该实验现场职责的正式结束。
keyFeatures: Experiment summary: code, location, growth stage, total duration
All stages summary with status per stage
Final merge data summary (key totals across all stages)
Experiment status: 已归档
Link to final report (redirect to Web or view on App)
keyFeaturesZh: 实验摘要：编号、地点、生长阶段、总周期
所有阶段汇总及各阶段状态
最终合并数据摘要（跨所有阶段的关键汇总）
实验状态：已归档
最终报告链接（跳转 Web 端或在 App 端查看）
dataSources: Stage state machine (all stages — must be 已结束)
dataSourcesZh: 阶段状态机（所有阶段——必须为已结束）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: App-side final report preview. Phase 3: Share experiment summary via WeChat to stakeholders.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：App 端最终报告预览。Phase 3：通过微信向利益相关方分享实验摘要。

pages.purpose: Mobile alert inbox for anomaly notifications. Farm managers and technicians receive push notifications for detected anomalies, review relevant reports, optionally add improvement notes, and track improvement outcomes.
pages.purposeZh: 异常通知的移动端预警收件箱。场长和技术员接收检测到的异常推送通知，查看相关报表，可选备注改善建议，并跟踪改善结果。
pages.businessValue: Proactive anomaly detection with closed-loop tracking. Moves from reactive 'discover problem during report review' to proactive 'alerted when anomaly occurs' with documented resolution.
pages.businessValueZh: 主动异常检测及闭环跟踪。从被动的「报表审查时发现问题」转变为主动的「异常发生时即预警」，并记录解决过程。
keyFeatures: Alert list: time, experiment, pen, anomaly type, severity, description
Severity classification badges (high/medium/low)
Push notification on new anomaly detection
Drill-down from alert to relevant report/chart
Improvement note annotation (text field per alert)
Improvement tracking status: 待处理/处理中/已解决
Alert history filterable by experiment, type, status
keyFeaturesZh: 预警列表：时间、实验、栏位、异常类型、严重程度、描述
严重程度分类标签（高/中/低）
新异常检测时的推送通知
从预警下钻至相关报表/图表
改善建议备注（每条预警的文本字段）
改善跟踪状态：待处理/处理中/已解决
可按实验、类型、状态筛选的预警历史
dataSources: Anomaly detection engine (rule-based, all data domains)
dataSourcesZh: 异常检测引擎（规则驱动，所有数据域）
预警表（读/写状态和备注）
相关报表数据（用于下钻上下文）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 2: Alert severity auto-escalation if not addressed within time window. Phase 3: ML-based anomaly detection replacing static rules. Phase 4: Predictive alerts (forecast anomaly before it occurs).
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 2：超时未处理预警自动升级。Phase 3：基于机器学习的异常检测替代静态规则。Phase 4：预测性预警（异常发生前预测）。

pages.purpose: Mobile-optimized data analysis view for quick in-field reference. Provides stage-level and experiment-level summaries with basic charts. Not intended to replace the full Web analysis experience.
pages.purposeZh: 移动端优化的数据分析视图，供现场快速参考。提供阶段级和实验级汇总及基础图表。不旨在替代 Web 端的完整分析体验。
pages.businessValue: Farm manager can check trends and verify data quality while still in the barn — enabling immediate follow-up rather than discovering issues later at a desktop.
pages.businessValueZh: 场长可在猪舍内即查看趋势并验证数据质量——支持立即跟进，而非事后在桌面端发现问题。
keyFeatures: Experiment-level key metric summary
Stage-level data summaries
Basic trend charts (mobile-optimized, simplified)
Data completeness dashboard per stage
Quick comparison: current stage vs previous stage
keyFeaturesZh: 实验级关键指标汇总
阶段级数据汇总
基础趋势图表（移动端优化，简化版）
每阶段数据完整度仪表盘
快速对比：当前阶段 vs 上一阶段
dataSources: Daily records (aggregated per stage and experiment)
dataSourcesZh: 日常记录（按阶段和实验汇总）
阶段状态机（阶段上下文）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 3: Interactive drill-down charts on mobile. Phase 4: Voice query ('show me mortality trend for this week').
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 3：移动端交互式下钻图表。Phase 4：语音查询（「显示本周死淘趋势」）。

pages.purpose: Mobile access to pre-built experiment reports. Allows farm managers and PhDs to view reports on-the-go. Optimized for reading and sharing, not heavy analysis.
pages.purposeZh: 移动端访问预置实验报表。允许场长和博士随时随地查看报表。优化阅读和分享体验，非重度分析。
pages.businessValue: Enables report consumption outside the office — during farm visits, meetings, or while traveling. Extends the reach of experiment insights.
pages.businessValueZh: 支持在办公室外消费报表——场区走访、会议或出差途中。扩展实验洞察的触达范围。
keyFeatures: 8 report types accessible (same as Web but mobile-optimized)
PDF share/export
Report view with pinch-to-zoom charts
Quick navigation between report types
Offline-cached last-viewed report
keyFeaturesZh: 8 种报表可访问（同 Web 端，移动端优化）
PDF 分享/导出
报表查看支持捏合缩放图表
报表类型间快速切换
最近查看报表离线缓存
dataSources: All experiment data (daily records, metadata, analysis results)
dataSourcesZh: 报表生成引擎（同 Web 端）
所有实验数据（日常记录、元数据、分析结果）
pages.futureRoadmap: Phase 3: WeChat mini-program report sharing. Phase 4: Voice-narrated report summary.
pages.futureRoadmapZh: Phase 3：微信小程序报表分享。Phase 4：语音播报报表摘要。
